report.faq3q: Can I get a refund if unhappy?

about.metaTitle: About AggreAPI — Neutral AI API Aggregator Comparison
about.metaDescription: Why we built AggreAPI: after getting burned by a reseller, we made a neutral comparison ranked only on price, speed and reliability. Affiliate payouts never affect ranking.
about.founderStory: I built AggreAPI because I got burned by a reseller myself. I topped up credit on a cheap one, only to have the model silently downgraded, my bill not add up, and no one to reach for a refund. There was no single place to see which reseller is genuinely cheap, stable, and unlikely to disappear — so I built one. Rankings here are based only on price, speed and reliability, never on who pays the highest commission. (Placeholder story — replace with your real experience.)
about.promise1Body: We earn affiliate commissions from some resellers, but that never changes the order. Listings are ranked only by price, speed and reliability — you cannot pay for a higher spot (sponsored slots are clearly labeled).
about.promise2Body: Prices, discounts and uptime are reviewed and refreshed regularly, and every figure carries a last-updated timestamp. Demo placeholder values will be replaced once real data sources are wired in.
about.promise3Body: Spot anything stale or wrong? Tell us via the contact page. Once verified we fix it quickly and note the correction where it matters.
about.audienceBody: Chinese developers in mainland China and across Asia, plus overseas Chinese and English-speaking developers — anyone who wants cheaper, more reliable access to AI APIs.
about.sourceBody: From each reseller’s public pricing pages and announcements, plus our own testing and user feedback. Some demo values are placeholders and will be replaced with verifiable data.
about.methodologyBody: We compute discounts against official prices, rank primarily by output price, and gauge reliability from 30-day uptime and a trust score. Our criteria are public and reproducible.

modelDetail.metaTitle: {model} API Price Comparison — Cheapest Aggregator Across {count} Providers
modelDetail.metaDescription: Which aggregator is cheapest for {model}? Compare {count} {model} API proxy providers in real time on output price, discount and reliability — from {cheapest}/1M tokens, up to {discount}% below official.
modelDetail.intro: {count} resellers offering {model}, ranked by output price (USD /1M tokens), lowest first. Currently from {cheapest} — up to {discount}% below the {official} official price.
modelDetail.faqQ1: How much cheaper is {model} via a reseller?
modelDetail.faqA1: Across the {count} resellers listed here, {model} output starts at {cheapest}/1M tokens — up to {discount}% below the {official} official benchmark. Always confirm live pricing with each reseller.
modelDetail.faqQ2: Which reseller is cheapest and most stable for {model}?
modelDetail.faqA2: By output price the current cheapest is ranked first; for stability weigh each reseller’s 30-day uptime and trust score — open a reseller page for the full data.
modelDetail.faqQ3: Do these {model} resellers accept Alipay or WeChat?
modelDetail.faqA3: Most resellers targeting China and Asia accept Alipay, WeChat or USDT; see each reseller’s detail page for exact payment methods.
modelDetail.disclaimer: Prices, discounts and status are demo placeholder values, not official commitments; verify live pricing on the reseller’s site before buying. This page contains affiliate links.
